summary: Poor recording quality with hollow sound throughout, only Ripple sounds decent
review: Both reviewers complain that the audio is generally lousy and hollow‑sounding, making most of the concert difficult to enjoy. One note mentions Ripple as a relatively good‑ sounding track, but no other musical highlights are discussed.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews consistently criticize the sound quality; there is virtually no information on performance quality, leading to a low overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as hollow, muffled and generally lousy; only the song Ripple is noted as sounding decent.
